name: Virginia Energy Resources Inc.
description: Virginia Energy Resources Inc. is a Canada-based resource company focused on the identification, acquisition, exploration, and development of uranium deposits. The company is primarily engaged in the development of the Coles Hill uranium project located in the southern part of the state of Virginia in the United States. As a publicly traded entity on the TSX Venture Exchange, Virginia Energy Resources Inc. aims to advance its uranium assets while navigating the regulatory and environmental landscape associated with uranium mining in the region.
